description:
💀﹒cod:mw // chef ! au

After retiring, Ghost ended up becoming a chef at a restaurant.

// It was no secret that during all his years in the SAS, Ghost found easy solace in cooking. The methodical preparations and techniques required gave his mind something productive to focus on and prevent from wandering to darker places. Even so, the idea of becoming a chef after retiring from the Special Forces seemed strange even to him.
